heading: Connect to Your Cloud Cluster Using Other Methods
body:
In order to connect to your cluster, you must get your
deployment's [a connection string that specifies the MONGODB-AWS authentication mechanism](manual/reference/connection-string).
Once you have the connection string, you can connect to your deployment
by using the following connection methods:

- [Driver](connect-via-driver)

- [Compass](atlas-connect-via-compass)

- [MongoDB Shell](connect-mongo-shell)

- [Connect to a Cluster via VS Code](mongodb-for-vscode)

- [Connect to a Cluster via the BI Connector](bi-connection)

> **Note:** To connect using mongodump or mongorestore,
> use the [Command Line Tools](command-line-tools) option in the
> **Cluster** sidebar. This
> creates an auto-generated template for connecting to your Atlas
> cluster with your preferred tool.
